steps.title: Use the limit signal
steps.content: The sentence introduces the underlined portion with the phrase This approach has some limits. The underlined portion then names one of those limits: data from Places API tend to be restricted to customer-facing places. So its role is to point out a specific weakness in the data used to study neighborhood amenities.

steps.title: Reject wrong roles
steps.content: Choice D matches that role because the underlined portion identifies a flaw in relying on the Places API data set. Choice A discusses neighborhood boundaries, which are not mentioned in the underlined portion. Choice B describes the computer model introduced earlier in the passage. Choice C focuses on potential utility, but the underlined wording is about a limitation before the passage returns to the data set's reliability. The answer is D.
